flags.label: 1M context window
flags.description: Request the 1M-token context window on models that support it (Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6). Off caps the session at 200K.

default.label: Ask first
default.description: Prompts before edits, commands & other risky tools.

acceptEdits.label: Accept edits
acceptEdits.description: Auto-approves file edits; still asks for commands.

plan.label: Plan only
plan.description: Reads & reasons only — no edits or commands run.

bypassPermissions.label: Yolo
bypassPermissions.description: Runs every tool without asking. Use with care.

auto.label: Autopilot
auto.description: An AI classifier approves or denies each tool call.
